spec_match.rationale: Demo invokes the relevant API surface (WebGPU Compatibility mode) and surfaces the result in the page, demonstrating the spec behaviour the feature ships.

interactive.rationale: Adapter request and device policy controls now drive core, compatibility, and compare-both WebGPU request paths.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates and delivers on the framing used in the feature index card.

edge_cases.rationale: The page surfaces no WebGPU, no adapter, request failure, portable device, and core-features-enabled branches.

references.rationale: Page cites the required chromestatus.com/feature/6436406437871616 self-heal link (CLAUDE.md rule 3).

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex of note, and button overrides keep background + color paired (CLAUDE.md rules 5 and 6).

summary: Compatibility Demo now gives visitors a real adapter/device decision surface instead of a thin one-button probe.
